title: Spanish Celery Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry made with celery, crunchy vegetables, and a hint of Spanish spices. Serve as a side dish or add to your favorite meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped celery and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until tender.
Add the chopped bell peppers and cook for another 2-3 minutes.
Pour in the stir fry sauce and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
